prompt: Tap left hole card to keep your read and action aligned.
why_v1: Card anchors keep your decision process consistent.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Js is the anchor card, so the read stays tied to the exact hole-card cue this line is built on.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The jack of spades matters because that card changes blocker and showdown strength, which is what keeps the mixed-game plan stable or pushes it forward.
